name: Linear
philosophy: A near-black product-focused marketing canvas built around #010102 (the deepest dark surface of any tool in this collection), light gray text (#f7f8f8), and the signature Linear lavender-blue (#5e6ad2) used as the single chromatic accent.
trademark_signals: Dark-canvas marketing system — (#010102) is the deepest dark in this collection
Lavender-blue brand accent ( #5e6ad2) — used scarcely on brand mark, focus, and the primary CTA
Four-step surface ladder (canvas → surface-1 → surface-2 → surface-3 → surface-4) carries hierarchy without shadow
Display tracking pulls aggressively negative (-3.0px at 80px); body holds at -0.05px
Cards use 12px corners with 1px hairline borders — never pill, rarely 16px
ai_slop_avoided: Don't ship a light-mode marketing page
Don't use lavender as a section background or card fill
Don't introduce a second chromatic accent (orange, pink, green for marketing)
